---
title: "Incomplete faces are completed using a more average face"
authors: "Kramer, R. S. S., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2022
date: 2022-01-01
pub-journal: "Cognitive Research: Principles and Implications"
volume: "7:708"
doi: "10.1186/s41235-022-00429-y"
pdf: "assets/papers/2022/kramer&jones2022.pdf"
categories: [face-perception]
---
